_provenance.description: Independent reference specific yields (E_y) from the PVGIS PVcalc oracle for known sites. Used as Track F reference-case regression + a sanity-envelope calibration check. These are real, fetched values — not invented.
_provenance.note: E_y is annual AC energy per installed kWp (kWh/kWp/yr) under PVGIS' own 14% loss assumption. Cape Town uses aspect=180 (north) because it is in the SOUTHERN hemisphere — directly corroborating the E1 equator-facing fix.
